titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hudhayfah Ibn Mansur
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hudhayfah Ibn Mansur

segments: ه عن حذيفة بن منصور فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن حذيفة بن منصور.
arabic.text: ه عن حذيفة بن منصور فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن حذيفة بن منصور.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur.
